approvals.note: Definition approval after review of truthful completed preparation/configuration tasks, canonical requirements, and previously completed native verification; hosted CI and closing approval remain later gates.
Fresh definition approval after the explicitly authorized lifecycle reset and truthful requirement-to-test evidence mapping.
Closing approval after normalized canonical requirement blocks and committed-head build, vet, full race tests, and all four requirement mappings passed.
Fresh closing approval after audited reopen and successful build, vet, race-test, and four-requirement verification for the approved workflow trigger correction.

reopenings.reason: The approved CHG-0002 workflow trigger correction changed delivery inputs after CHG-0001 acceptance and requires fresh verification evidence.

superseded_approval.note: Closing approval after normalized canonical requirement blocks and committed-head build, vet, full race tests, and all four requirement mappings passed.
